issue.title: Design: "How It Works" section redesign — demo video or animated node diagram
issue.description: The current scroll-to-paragraph "See How It Works" is weak. Replace with either: (a) a 30-second product demo video (screen recording of taking the test + seeing results), or (b) an animated node-based diagram showing 120 questions → algorithm → 4 framework outputs. Pick the best option and spec it. Must feel premium and intentional.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
